goal: Build and prove an end-to-end website-to-MCP skill across multiple runnable fixture sites

scope.notes: This workspace began outside Git. Public GitHub publication is an explicit final user-authorized endpoint.

truth_surface: fresh 117-test suite, three live subprocess fixture sites, generated MCP STDIO handshakes and promoted executions, benchmark JSON, cold collaboration-agent trace, and final adversarial review

acceptance_criteria: Three real local fixture sites covering public, session, and CLI-only/hybrid behavior
Standalone compact MCP generation and promoted execution
Unit, contract, E2E, performance, and cold-agent evidence
invariants: No raw credentials, cookies, CSRF values, or base64 payloads in evidence
Writes require confirmation and do not blindly retry
Only fresh exact E2E or contract proof promotes a capability
assumptions: Real fixture sites are local runnable HTTP/CLI processes
Collaboration-agent trace provenance is not independently attested

agent_registry.goal: Design the discovery compiler and standalone MCP architecture
agent_registry.required_output: touchpoints, risks, tests, and architecture proposal

agent_registry.goal: Design and validate three real fixture sites and E2E matrix
agent_registry.required_output: fixture contracts, scenario matrix, and verification commands
agent_registry.notes: Public catalog, session admin, and hybrid CLI fixtures implemented and tested.

agent_registry.goal: Harden state, validation, evidence, auth, and promotion boundaries
agent_registry.notes: All accepted blockers were fixed and re-reviewed.

agent_registry.goal: Review final release evidence and public package readiness
agent_registry.notes: Approved with an accurately documented non-independent collaboration-trace caution.

evidence_ledger.summary: Initial package was planning-only and could overwrite state or validate false completion
evidence_ledger.evidence: Initial review reproductions and RED state/validator tests
evidence_ledger.impact: Implemented create-only scaffold, signed transitions, semantic validation, secret scanning, and promotion gate

evidence_ledger.summary: Multiple real fixture sites and clean generated MCP execution are required proof surfaces
evidence_ledger.evidence: Promoted fixture matrix output and generated runtime E2E tests
evidence_ledger.impact: Public, session, hybrid, and CLI-only paths are exercised over live subprocesses

evidence_ledger.summary: Cold collaboration-agent evidence is structurally valid but not independently attested
evidence_ledger.impact: Public documentation explicitly labels provenance and uninstrumented metrics
evidence_ledger.risk: Non-independent trace should not be represented as external-agent attestation
evidence_ledger.revisit: Run an external agent through run_agent_eval.py when independent attestation is required

evidence_ledger.summary: Final adversarial release review approved the package
evidence_ledger.evidence: Fresh 117-test suite, promoted matrix, benchmark, CLI-only test, and hygiene review

slice_queue.objective: Safe scaffold, transitions, semantic validation, and secret scanning
slice_queue.implementation_notes: Create-only workspaces, signed evidence, semantic levels, and strict promotion validation
slice_queue.done_condition: State/security regressions pass and reviewers approve

slice_queue.objective: Live fixture discovery, checkpoints, and CLI-only support
slice_queue.gap_check: Live fixture discovery and CLI-only RED tests
slice_queue.implementation_notes: Same-origin evidence capture, signed checkpoints, transaction-safe commits, and cli://local
slice_queue.done_condition: Three fixture and CLI-only discovery paths pass

slice_queue.objective: Standalone generated MCP, promotion, and adapters
slice_queue.gap_check: Clean subprocess protocol and promoted execution RED tests
slice_queue.implementation_notes: Compact catalog, safe HTTP/auth/file/CLI adapters, companion skill, and exact proof promotion
slice_queue.rollback: Remove generated runtime assets and promotion scripts
slice_queue.done_condition: Generated packages execute promoted real-fixture workflows

slice_queue.objective: Release evidence, cold-agent trace, and public handoff
slice_queue.gap_check: Discovery-only matrix and fake-agent evidence RED tests
slice_queue.implementation_notes: Promoted matrix/benchmark executions and truthfully labelled collaboration trace
slice_queue.done_condition: Fresh matrix, benchmark, trace schema, adversarial approval, and public publish proof

verification_matrix.result: 117 tests passed in final release review
verification_matrix.proves: Unit, contract, fixture, generated runtime, promotion, matrix, and agent-evidence suites

verification_matrix.result: Public 2/2, session 10/5, and hybrid 4/4 promotions/executions completed
verification_matrix.proves: Live three-site discovery, proof, promotion, regeneration, and STDIO execution

verification_matrix.result: Cold/warm discovery and promoted execution budgets passed for all sites
verification_matrix.proves: Envelope, latency, bytes, and call measurements
Cold collaboration-agent public promoted-read trace satisfies structural schema
verification_matrix.notes: Provenance is explicitly non-independent and metrics are uninstrumented

verification_matrix.proves: Public GitHub repository and initial release commit exist at origin

handoff_notes: Published at https://github.com/codyrobertson/building-website-mcps. Final adversarial release review approved publication. The collaboration-agent trace is deliberately documented as structurally valid but not independently attested.
